steps.title: Spot the evidence of his role
steps.content: The key signal is that Sumner “helped to found the psychology department at Howard University.” He was actively creating this expansion of opportunities, not passively receiving benefits or playing a marginal role.

steps.title: Apply to find the match
steps.content:
”Proponent of” means an active advocate or champion for a cause.

This perfectly captures someone who founded a department to expand educational opportunities for Black students.

The other choices all fail because they describe him as secondary (supplement), as someone who benefited rather than created change (beneficiary), or are nonsensical (distraction).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
